tagline: A Home Away From Home For Your Dog
hours: Available 24/7 — we're always home! Except for our own occasional holidays, care is available every day of the year. Early bookings are advised to avoid disappointment.
aboutTitle: Your Dog Is In Safe Hands
aboutText1: Hi, I'm Lindsey! Based in Blackpool, I provide a warm, home-based environment where your dog is treated like one of the family. Every dog in my care receives individual attention, love, and the kind of care I'd want for my own pets.
aboutText2: With a genuine passion for animals and a commitment to their wellbeing, I ensure every dog leaves happy, tired out from play, and ready to do it all again tomorrow.
pricingNote: 💬 Have multiple dogs? Get in touch for a multi-dog discount. We're happy to accommodate families!
